prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. prop (mug_red_v1): state: steaming then cold, visually consistent. Protagonist A holds a key in his hand., The steam from the red mug suddenly dissipates, turning cold like a sigh. Narration: "他握住钥匙，杯子里的热气立刻变冷，像一口叹息。". Protagonist A says: "你想让我过去？". Camera motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action. A man holding a key, a red mug on a table, steam rising then fading, cold atmosphere, dim kitchen lighting, cinematic, moody, close-up on hand and mug. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
negative: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, bright, sunny, cartoonish, low detail, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, mouth mismatch, silent face, frozen expression, unnatural dubbing, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action
tool_hint: Copy "prompt" and "negative" into video generation tool. Upload "condition_images" for img2vid start/end frame conditioning if supported. "context_ref_images" are previous shot keyframes for visual continuity. Duration is a guideline.
